about:
Dr. V. Krishna is a Professor in the Department of Mechanical Engineering and
Dean, Student Affairs. He has received his Ph.D. from Visveswaraya Technological
University, Belgaum, India for his thesis on 'Investigations on Cryogenic Heat
Exchangers'. He started his academic career in March 1993 and has over 28 years
of experience in teaching, research, consultancy and administration. He is
Reviewer for - Heat Transfer Engineering 1ed by Taylor and Francis,
International Journal of Heat and Mass Transfer 1ed by Elsevier etc. Dr. V.
Krishna specializes in the Thermal Engineering Domain and is the Head of the
Process Modelling Research Laboratory (PMR Lab) which focusses on cutting edge
research in the field of process modelling and its allied areas. He has over 24
publications in peer reviewed international journals (10) and conferences (14).
He has been an invited speaker and chair at numerous national and international
conferences. Dr. V. Krishna was invited as Visiting Professor at Technologico de
Monterrey, Mexico from 25th to 31st August 2018. He visited two of its campuses
at Toluca and Puebla. During this period he took a course on 'Automobile
Radiators-an Inside Story' and also presented seminars on 'Drivers for
Sustainable Energy in the Automobile Industry' and 'Introduction to Internal
Combustion Engine'. He has also visited a number of universities in UK in 2013,
as part of a tour to look at the best practices and possible collaborations. Dr.
V. Krishna is also an accomplished mridangam artiste and has accompanied most of
the top musicians across the country in carnatic music concerts.

about:
Dr. Arti is Professor and Chairperson of CSE(AI & ML), EC Campus. She completed
her B.Sc. (Hons) in Mathematics in 1994 and M.Sc. in Mathematics in 1996 from
Delhi University. She later earned her M.Tech in Computer Science and
Engineering from Allahabad Agricultural University and received her Ph.D. in
Computer Science Engineering from the Faculty of Technology and Engineering at
Maharishi Dayanand University, Rohtak, Haryana, in 2009. She served as a
Professor and Head of the MCA Department at PESIT, Bangalore South Campus, until
August 2020. Since then, she has been a Professor in the Department of Computer
Science Engineering at PES University. With over 25 years of academic
experience, including 16 years dedicated to research, Dr. Arya’s expertise spans
Spatial Data Mining, Natural Language Processing, Machine Learning, Artificial
Intelligence, Graph Neural Networks, Generative AI, Unstructured Data
Management, Applied Numerical Methods, and Biostatistics. She is a Senior Member
of IEEE, a life member of CSI and IAENG. Additionally, she serves on the
reviewer board of several reputed international journals, including SNAM
(Springer, Scopus indexed) and IJCDS (Scopus indexed). Dr. Arya has
approximately 95+ publications in various esteemed international conferences and
journals. She is currently guiding 2 PhD scholars and 2 have already completed
in the area of natural language processing and spatial data mining. She has
supervised approximately 200 undergraduate students for various research
projects. Further details can be found on her LinkedIn profile https://
in.linkein.com/in/artiarya.

about:
Bachelor of Mechanical Engineering from PES Institute of Technology, Bangalore
University and Masters Degree from BMS College of Engineering, Bangalore,
Visveswaraya Technological University. He received his Ph.D. degree from
National Institute of Technology (NIT), Tiruchirappalli during 2011 in the area
of impact characteristics of composite laminates. He started his career as
Graduate Engineer Trainee at Bharat Earth Movers Limited (BEML). He joined PESIT
as lecturer during 2000 and presently holding a position as Professor and
Chairperson in the Department of Mechanical Engineering, PES University. He is
the Domain Head of Advanced Composite Research Centre (ACRC) at PES University.
He also had held the position of Dean Academics for a period of one year at
Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology, Greater Noida, UP. He is the
faculty advisor of Team HAYA, the racing car team of PES and he is also the
faculty integrator of PACE activities. He has led the PACE team to University of
Sao Paulo, Brazil and University of Cincinnati, US.

about:
Dr. Reshma S.V obtained her MSc degree from University of Mysore with Gold medal
and second rank, MPhil degree from Mangalore University and PhD from
Visvesvaraya Technological University, Belgaum.. She was the recipient of K.
Narayanan Gold Medal in MSc Botany, University of Mysore (1994), K. Narayanan
Cash Prize for highest score in II MSc Botany, University of Mysore (1994) and
2nd rank holder in M.Sc Botany, University of Mysore (1994). She is qualified in
SLET - Life Sciences - Masters Level (State Level Eligibility Test For
Lectureship). She worked on the PhD research topic titled 'Cloning, expression
and characterization of select hypothetical proteins from Halobacterium and
Bacillus Species'. She has 25 years of teaching experience in Biotechnology &
Botany and developed skills in life-science related areas by virtue of teaching
and guiding students at both graduate and postgraduate levels. She has 1ed 7
papers in International/National journals and 3 books. Her areas of interest are
Plant Biotechnology, Genetics & Molecular Biology, biodiversity conservation and
Seed Technology. She is the Co-investigator of a DBT funded project on
Production of TAGs from microalgae using photo-bioreactor intended for biodiesel
production. She has provided technical assistance and guidance to students in
Research & Development activities, higher studies and personality development.
She has designed and conducted various faculty and student workshops. She is a
Life member of Society for Biological Chemists and Life Member, Indian Science
Congress Association, India.

about:
Dr Rupa Sarkar is a faculty of Quantitative Techniques, Business Economics and
Marketing Research at the Department of Management and Commerce, PES University
of Bangalore. Her areas of expertise include Mathematical Economics,
Econometrics, Health Economics, Behavioural Economics. Dr Sarkar's work has been
1ed at respected peer-reviewed journals, such as Journal of Health Management,
Indian Journal of Health Research and Development and Indian Journal of
Community Health. She has been selected to present her research at top national
accounting conferences, including the Indian Association for Research in
National Income and Wealth. Her Doctoral Degree is from Department of Economics,
supervised by Dr Mahesh E, Christ University, Bangalore, overseen and evaluated
by Dr K. Gayithri, Professor, Centre for Economic Studies and Policy, ISEC,
Bangalore. Dr Sarkar also has a Master's Degree in the Discipline of Education
from the School of Education, Christ University, Bangalore. She has contributed
in the field of Education through Scopus indexed journal publications, UGC
Journal publications, book chapters and research presentations in National and
International conferences. Before joining PES University, Dr Sarkar was working
in Christ University, Bangalore. Dr Sarkar has a rich teaching experience of
more than 7 years and she has taught over 30 papers in Economics and Education.

about:
Dr. Shikha Tripathi holds a PhD from BITS, Pilani, India and a Masters degree
from BIT, Mesra, Ranchi, India. Her research interests include Speech/Image
Processing, Architectures for transforms used in signal processing applications,
Music signal processing and Control algorithms for robotic applications. Dr.
Tripathi joined PES University, Bangalore in July 2017. Currently she is serving
as Professor in Dept. of Electronics & Communication Engineering and research
head of the Electronic City campus. Prior to this she was serving as Professor &
Chairperson, Dept. of Electronics & Communication Engineering, Amrita Vishwa
Vidyapeetham, School of Engineering, Bangalore campus, since July 2009. She has
worked at BITS Pilani, Pilani campus in various capacities before joining Amrita
Vishwa Vidyapeetham during 1998 to 2009.

about:
Director of Cloud Computing & Big Data (CCBD), Centre for Data Sciences &
Applied Machine Learning (CDSAML). She completed her Bachelor's degree from
UVCE, Bangalore University in 1989, Master's degree from Sri Jayachamarajendra
College of Engineering, Mysore University in 1993. She secured the First rank in
the university in her M. Tech course. She completed the 'C' level course from
DOEACC and holds a Ph.D in the domain of Face Recognition from Visvesvaraya
Technological University (VTU). She has 28 years of teaching experience and 15
years of research experience. She has several journal articles, national and
international conference publications to her credit. She has taught a plethora
of courses and has guided several projects and research activities at
undergraduate and postgraduate levels. She is a member of BOS of several
organizations, reviewer of conferences and member of many technical committees.
Dr. Shylaja is heading two centers at P E S University, the Center for Data
Sciences and Applied Machine Learning (CDSAML) and the Huawei Innovation Lab,
facilitating research and internship opportunities for students and faculty
members. Her research areas include Image Processing, Computer Vision, Natural
Language Processing and Machine Learning.

about:
Dr. Veena S is the Chairperson, Department of Computer Application at PES
University, Bengaluru. She completed her MCA degree from Malnad College of
Engineering, University of Mysore and M.Tech. degree from AAIDU, Allahabad. She
holds a Ph.D in the area of Software Defined Networks from Visveswaraya
Technological University. She has 26 years of teaching experience and 14 years
of research experience. In her long teaching career, she has taught many
different courses like Computer Networks, Advanced Computer Networks, Mobile
Computing, Discrete Mathematical Structures, C, C++, Database Management
Systems, Data Structures, Analysis and Design of Algorithms, Artificial
Intelligence etc. at undergraduate, graduate, post graduate levels. She has 1ed
seven research papers in National and International Conferences and Journals.
She has also worked as Co-investigator in two funded research projects from
Industry. She has been involved in training employees from IBM, Wipro and also
invited as keynote speaker in several Hands-on workshops in Computer Networking.
Dr. Veena has completed CCNA Exploration Certification course and involved in
training students for CCNA certification. She has guided several student
projects and research activities at undergraduate and post graduate levels. Her
areas of interest includes Software Defined Networks, IPv6, Network Security,
Sensor Networks and study of algorithms.

about:
Prof. Nitin V. Pujari is a distinguished academic and administrator, currently
serving as the Dean of the Internal Quality Assurance Cell (IQAC) at PES
University, Bengaluru. Since joining PES in 1991, Professor Pujari has played a
vital role in the institution’s academic vision, contributing more than three
decades of expertise in teaching, leadership, and research His career trajectory
at PES University reflects steady advancement and broad impact. He began as a
lecturer in 1991, progressing to Assistant Professor and Head of the Department
by 1997. By 2003, he became Professor and Head, and later served as Chairperson
of both the undergraduate and postgraduate Computer Science Engineering (CSE)
departments. Since 2019, he has led the IQAC, fostering a culture of continuous
academic improvement and institutional effectiveness As Dean, he has Conducted
and/or Participated in innumerable initiatives to enhance teaching quality,
student learning outcomes, and organizational best practices through robust
quality assurance frameworks. Nitin V. Pujari’s research interests include
Education Data Mining, Learning Analytics, Taxonomy in Education, Artificial
Intelligence, Machine Learning, Natural Language Processing, and Operating
Systems. His work is reflected in numerous scholarly publications, including
journal articles and conference proceedings that explore practical applications
of machine learning and analytics in education. Noteworthy publications cover
diverse areas, such as automated question bank generation, sign language
recognition, cloud computing evangelism, and neural network-based product
recognition He has guided a host of student research and capstone projects,
focusing on innovative problems like real-time video analysis, educational
taxonomy, and social network-driven recommendation systems. As the Principal
Resource Person for the PES-IBM Collaborative Program and leader of several
AICTE-sponsored modernization projects, he has consistently bridged academic
theory with practical implementation in both curriculum development and research
In addition, Nitin V. Pujari is also an entrepreneur and founder of Ordell Ugo,
a virtual entity framework established in 2012 to enhance the meta-cognitive
skills of participating students at PES University. His dual role as innovator
and mentor has enabled him to combine technical insights with pedagogical
advancements, preparing students for emerging challenges in computer Science
Nitin V. Pujari’s distinguished career is characterized by a commitment to
excellence in education, innovation in learning analytics, and leadership in
academic quality assurance. His holistic approach—spanning instruction,
research, administration, and community service—continues to influence computer
science education in India and inspire future generations of learners at PES
University.

about:
Raghavendra G. Kulkarni received BE in Electronics and Communication Engineering
from Karnatak University in 1979, MTech in Electrical Engineering from IIT
Madras in 1982, and PhD from IIT Kharagpur in 1998. He joined Hybrid
Microcircuits (HMC) division of Bharat Electronics Ltd., (BEL) Bengaluru in
1982, and developed several Surface Acoustic Wave (SAW) devices for commercial
and defence applications. From 1998 to 2014, Dr. Kulkarni successfully led a
team of R & D engineers for development of SAW devices, thick-film & thin-film
HMCs, and MEMS pressure transducers for strategic applications. Dr. Kulkarni won
two BEL R & D Excellence Awards; first one for development of SAW filters used
in TV receivers (1989), and the second one for development of HMCs used in
missile telemetry (2011). In November 2013, he received Raksha-Mantri Award for
development of electronic modules for missiles. Dr. Kulkarni has obtained two
patents on SAW devices and has authored more than eighty-five papers in the
field of SAW devices, signal processing, and mathematics. He is the inventor of
several window functions like polynomial windows, hyperbolic cosine windows, and
sine windows, for signal processing applications. In September 2014, Dr.
Kulkarni joined PES University, Bengaluru, as Distinguished Professor in the
Department of Electronics & Communication Engineering. He is a senior member of
IEEE, life member of Ramanujan Mathematical Society, Indian Mathematical
Society, and IMAPS-India. He has given invited talks at TIFR Mumbai, IIT Delhi,
SSPL Delhi, IGCAR Kalpakkam, LRDE Bangalore, IISc Bengaluru, Defence Lab
Jodhpur, etc., and conducted workshops on design of SAW filters at ISRO and BEL,
Bengaluru. Dr Kulkarni received outstanding educator award for the year 2023
from IEEE AP/MTT Society Bangalore chapter for his outstanding contribution to
the antenna/microwave education. He also received Protsahan award for the
journal paper publications in the field of communication engineering from IEEE
COmSoc Bangalore chapter.

about:
Dr. Adithya Balasubramanyam holds a full-time Ph.D. degree from Chung-Ang
University, South Korea in the area of Computer Graphics and Virtual Reality.
His interests are in the area of Augmented and Virtual Reality, Digital Twins,
System Simulations and Modeling. He has thought computer science engineering to
undergrad students for 3 years at Jyothy Institute of Technology, Bangalore. He
has more than 3+ years of industrial experience and has been rendering technical
consultation as a freelancer for more than 10 years now. Currently, he is
associated with the ISFCR and IoT research center at PESU. During his tenure in
Schneider Electric as a Software Engineer, he has been recognized for his
contribution to improvement in the performance and design of Schneider's
products. Dr. Adithya has filed 4 patents, published extensively in top venues,
and mentors both PhD. and undergraduate students. His recent State of the Art
work includes the Digital Twin of the Human Heart and Human Gut. He has served
as a jury member in Start-up Karnataka, Gov. Of Karnataka. Additionally, he
co-founded Education Informal School Visits, promoting scientific literacy among
underprivileged children—a testament to his commitment to societal impact..

about:
Dr. Anuradha M holds both Bachelor’s and Master’s degrees in Engineering from
Bangalore University. During her academic tenure, she excelled in the subject of
Advanced Control Systems and secured the second rank at the university level in
her Master’s program. She was subsequently awarded a Doctoral degree from the
prestigious Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Anantapur, Andhra
Pradesh. She began her professional journey with the Karnataka Electricity Board
in Bangalore as a trainee. In 1992, she joined P.E.S. Institute of Technology
(PESIT), where she served in various academic roles—starting as a Lecturer, then
as Assistant Professor in the Department of Electronics and Communication
Engineering (ECE) until 2001. She later served as Professor and Head of the
Telecommunication Engineering Department until May 2018. From June 2017 to July
2023, she held the position of Chairperson of the ECE Department at PES
University (PESU). She is currently serving as a Professor in the Department of
Electronics and Communication Engineering at PESU. Her research interests span
Distributed Generation, Microgrids, Reliability, Antennas, and Electromagnetics,
V2X. She successfully completed an in-house project funded by PES and has
published several research papers in reputed journals. Notably, she received
commendation and a monetary incentive from the Central Power Research Institute
(CPRI) for her publication in the Journal of CPRI. She is currently working on a
funded project related to V2G. She has actively organized and contributed to
numerous technical workshops and seminars in areas such as Control Systems,
Reliability Engineering, Electromagnetics, Antennas, Mobile Communication, and
Renewable Energy. Additionally, she has conducted workshops on holistic topics
like Spirituality, Yoga, and Personality Development. To bridge the gap between
theoretical concepts and real-world applications, she has initiated and led
several industrial visits for students to organizations such as BSNL, AIR, SPT,
ISRO, BEL, BHEL, Micropack, and P&T. She is also passionate about community
service, having organized multiple outreach programs for government school
children and visually challenged students. Under her leadership, the department
has received the Best Department Stall award multiple times at PRAKALPA, a
prominent student project exhibition hosted by the institute.

about:
Dr. Ashok Kumar Patil holds a full-time Ph.D. in Computer Graphics and Virtual
Reality from the Graduate School of Advanced Imaging Science, Multimedia, and
Film (GSAIM), Chung-Ang University, Seoul, South Korea. He is currently a
faculty member at PES University, Bengaluru, where he is associated with the
Centre for Internet of Things (IoT) and leads the Mobility and Autonomous
Systems (MARS) Lab (https://www.iot.pes.edu/mars). Dr. Patil's research spans
the domains of Computer Graphics, Virtual Reality, Human-Computer Interaction
(HCI), automation in 3D reconstruction, and Autonomous Vehicles. He has over 11
years of active research experience, 2+ years of industry experience, and 3+
years of teaching experience, enabling him to bridge the gap between
cutting-edge research, real-world applications, and student learning. His
ongoing projects include developing precision landing algorithms for drones on
dynamic platforms, autonomous navigation systems for mobile robots, and
intelligent robotic arms for sketching and manipulation based on natural
language inputs. Before joining PES University, Dr. Patil served as a
Postdoctoral Researcher and Research Associate at the Virtual Environments Lab,
Chung-Ang University. During his research tenure, he worked on several Korean
government-funded projects and presented his work at reputed international
conferences. He has also contributed as an editor and author to manuscripts
published in high-impact international journals. At PES University, Dr. Patil is
actively mentoring Ph.D. students, driving interdisciplinary research,
collaborating with industry partners, and contributing to curriculum development
in robotics and automation. His future research aims include impactful
innovations in drone technology, autonomous systems, and immersive simulations.

name: Deepa S
about:
Prof. Deepa is the Director of PESU Research Foundation since March 2024 and
coordinates multiple research activities in the Electronic City Campus of PES
University. Driven by passion for multidisciplinary research and with a strong
background in academia and industry, she imparts a well-rounded perspective in
driving impactful research initiatives. She has received her Masters degree in
Computer Science & Engineering from Florida Atlantic University, M Tech in
Polymer Technology from Cochin University of Science & Technology and B Tech in
Chemical Engineering from University of Calicut.

name: Dr. Farida Begam M
about:
Dr. M. Farida Begam completed Ph.D., in Computer Science and Engineering in
Bharathidasan University, India, in 2015 received M.Tech in Computer Science,
from the National Institute of Technology, Trichy, India in 2006 and pursued her
bachelor's degree B.E in Computer Science and Engineering in Mookambigai College
of Engineering, Bharathidasan University, Trichy in 1998. She had worked as a
Professor and Head of the Department, Information Science and Engineering at CMR
Institute of Technology, Bangalore. She is a Senior IEEE Member. Dr. Farida is
an academician for 26 years and published Scopus indexed papers in reputed
Journals and Conferences. She is passionate in continuous teaching-learning
processes and involved in research related student centric learning
methodologies. She worked in University of Bolton, RAK, U.A.E as an Adjunct
Professor. She worked as an Adjunct Faculty in Higher Colleges of Technology
Dubai Women’s College, Murdoch University, Dubai and as a Senior Lecturer in the
Department of Engineering and Information Technology, Manipal University Dubai
Campus and handled various IT related basic and advanced courses. She also had
industry experience and worked as a Technical Evangelist in the Education and
Research department in Infosys Technologies Ltd. India. She is a Cisco Certified
Network associate (CCNA) and handled CCNA training courses in Manipal University
Dubai Campus. Her research domain includes Machine/Deep Learning, NLP, Semantic
Web and Knowledge Management.

7. Electrical and Optical properties of Amorphous Materials: The main challenge in
investigating any amorphous material is their non-periodic nature. Never the
less, the local structure or short-range structure resembles their crystalline
counter parts. I use various spectroscopic techniques like: Raman, IR, EPR/NMR
to first investigate the local /short-range structure and then try to correlate
th
8. i) Vanadium based glasses: Vanadium shows a variety of oxidation sates which is
of interest for various technological applications. In glasses usually it shows
4+ and 5+ states which is exploited for switching and polaronic conduction. I am
interested in doping the vanadate glasses with various alkali ions and check
their suitability in battery materials, super capacitors etc.
9. ii)Tellurium based glasses: Tellurium based materials are most sought-after in
optical engineering / photonic applications due to its high refractive index,
low phonon energy. I am interested in novel optical properties shown by these
class of glasses after doping with rare-earth ions. I try to correlate the
optical properties to change in the local environment and exploit it.
10. iii)Conducting polymer Nano composite: This is mostly a collaborative work. I
collaborate with Prof. Raghu Menon�s lab at Dept. of Physics, IISc. We
investigate the transport and structure of the thin films of conducting polymer
composites.
11. Investigation on Li-ion motion and local structure in lithium vanadate glasses
for possible battery material was awarded a grant of 40 lakh INR by Vision Group
of Science and Technology (VGST), Govt. of Karnataka Compleated 2025
12. Electrical Noise-based Quantum Random Number Generator using Quantum Dots. 8.5
Lakh rupees Q-PARK IISc, Awarded 2025 compleated Feb 2026

name: Dr. Kumar Raja N P
about:
Dr. Kumar Raja N.P. is a distinguished academician and seasoned professional in
the field of Management and Commerce with over 25 years of comprehensive
experience in teaching, research, administration, and institutional development.
His career reflects a deep commitment to fostering academic excellence,
mentoring future leaders, and bridging the gap between academia and industry.
Currently serving as a Professor at PES University, Bangalore, Dr. Raja has held
esteemed positions at several reputed institutions, including Associate
Professor roles at Kristu Jayanti College and Professor at SDGS College,
Hindupur, where he also served as Vice Principal. He began his academic journey
at Balayesu Degree & PG College, Hindupur, playing a pivotal role in developing
and leading the BBM and M.Com departments. Dr. Raja holds a Ph.D. in Management
from S.K. University and has further strengthened his academic foundation with
an M.B.A., M.Com, M.Phil., and APSET qualification in Commerce . His areas of
expertise span Marketing Management, Finance, and Human Resource Management, and
he has consistently delivered impactful lectures and courses across these
domains. An ardent researcher, Dr. Raja has guided over 500 UG and PG student
research projects and published more than 30 scholarly articles in
SCOPUS-indexed and UGC-CARE-listed journals. He has also authored and
co-authored five academic books, contributed to curriculum development, and
participated in national and international conferences, including those hosted
by IITs and IIMs. His academic contributions include being an appointed lesson
writer for S.K. University’s Distance Education Program and an editorial board
member for peer-reviewed journals. Beyond academics, Dr. Raja has made
significant contributions to institutional development—leading NAAC
accreditation teams, securing CBSE affiliation for schools, organizing CSR
initiatives such as 120+ free eye operation camps, and spearheading job fairs
and campus recruitment programs. His passion for student success and social
upliftment is evident through his engagement in entrepreneurship training and
faculty development programs. Dr. Kumar Raja N.P. is not only a scholar and
teacher but also a visionary leader whose dynamic approach to education
continues to inspire students, peers, and institutions alike.

about:
Dr. Mamatha H R is the Chairperson, Department of Computer Science and
Engineering at P E S University, Bangalore. She received her B.E. degree in
Computer Science and Engineering from Kuvempu University and her M.Tech degree
in Computer Networks and Engineering from Visvesvaraya Technological University.
She obtained her Doctoral Degree from Visvesvaraya Technological University and
has over 25 years of teaching experience. Her current research interests include
Natural Language Processing, Data Analytics, Pattern Recognition, and Image
Processing. She has authored over 100 international papers and is a life member
of the Indian Society for Technical Education, MIR Labs, and IACSIT. Dr. Mamatha
is a reviewer for various international conferences and journals, and has
mentored students for international competitions, including the 2006 Windows
Embedded Students Challenge Competition held at Microsoft Campus, Redmond,
Seattle, USA, and the 2021 VizWiz Grand Challenge Workshop at The University of
Texas at Austin.

about:
He is currently heading CORI (Crucible of Research and Innovation), a center for
interdisciplinary exploration and CRSST (Center for Research in Space, Science
and Technology) and is also a Professor with the Department of Electronics and
Communication Engineering (ECE), at PES University. He gained rich exposure to
design related to avionics and spacecraft systems during his stints as Project
Trainee at Indian Space Research Organization and as a scientist at Aeronautical
Development Agency (ADA), DRDO Lab. He received Best M.Tech Supervisor Award
(Second Prize) from the Indian Society for Technical Education (ISTE) for the
year 2021, IETE Biman Behari Sen Memorial Award in 2015, BITES Best Ph.D. Thesis
Award from the Board for IT Education Standards in 2015, Young Engineer Award in
the year 2013 from the Institution of Engineers (India). He has six patent
grants and five patents are under examination. He has published 125+ papers in
International Journals/Conferences and has received nearly 1000 citations with
h-index 17 and i10-index 28 for his research papers and has received a couple of
best paper awards too. Three of his research papers published in reputed
International Journals were listed in the Top 25 hottest articles ranking
3rd(IET Signal Processing), 8th (Elsevier Microprocessor and Microsystems), and
22nd(Elsevier Neurocomputing).

name: Dr. Menaka C
about:
Dr. MENAKA C is the Professor in the Department of Computer Application at PES
University, Bengaluru. She completed her MCA and BCA degree from VYSYA COLLEGE,
SALEM TAMILNADU. She holds a Ph.D. in the area of Cloud Computing from
Bharathiar University, Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu. She has 19 years of teaching
experience and 6 years of research experience. In her long teaching career, she
has taught many different courses like Computer Networks, Advanced Computer
Networks, Cloud Computing, Data Structures, C, C++, JAVA, Web Programming,
Database Management Systems, Data Structures, Analysis and Design of Algorithms,
Artificial Intelligence etc. at undergraduate, graduate, post graduate levels.
She has published several research papers in National and International
Conferences and Journals. Her areas of interest includes Cloud Computing and
Network Security.

about:
Dr B. Niranjana Krupa is a Professor in the Department of Electronics and
Communication Engineering at PES University, Bangalore. She has received her
Bachelor of Engineering Degree in Electronics and Communication and Master
Degree in Computer Engineering from University of Mysore. She has also been
awarded with a doctoral degree in Electrical Electronics and Systems Engineering
from the prestigious National University of Malaysia, where she also served as a
Post-doctoral Fellow. She has a rich and a varied experience in both industry
and academics. Her research interests involve biomedical signal processing,
instrumentation and development of intelligent systems. Two projects that were
completed under her guidance and supervision have won first place in
competitions held at national level. She has also been presented with
'Sir.M.Visvesvaraya Award for Best Social Impact', for a project on cardiac
disorders in Prakalp - 2011, at PESIT. She has number of publications in the
field of Biomedical Signal Processing, of which one of her research papers was
awarded as the best paper in an International conference, IEEE INDICON 2015.

about:
Dr. Sanjeev G. received his B. E. degree in Electrical and Electronics
Engineering from Dr. Ambedkar Institute of Technology, Bangalore and the M.
Tech. degree in Digital Electronics and Communication Engineering from M. S.
Ramaiah Institute of Technology, Bangalore, both from Visvesvaraya Technological
University, Belgaum. He obtained his Ph.D. degree in signal processing for
communications from the Indian Institute of Science, Bangalore. He is currently
a professor in the department of Electronics and Communication Engineering at
PES University, Bangalore. He has earlier worked with PES Institute of
Technology and CMR Institute of Technology in Bangalore. His research interests
are in the areas of detection and estimation theory, information theory and
statistics, cross-layer optimization and machine learning techniques for
communication systems. He is a co-recipient of the best paper awards at IEEE

name: Dr. Sharavana K
about:
Dr. Sharavana K. is an Associate Professor in the Department of Computer Science
and Engineering (UG Studies) at P E S University, Bangalore. He earned his
Bachelor's degree from Visvesvaraya Technological University (VTU) in 2004, a
Master's degree from Sathyabama University, Chennai, in 2009, and holds a Ph.D.
in High-Performance Computing (HPC) in Cloud Computing from VTU. With over 18
years of teaching experience and one year of research experience, Dr. Sharavana
has contributed extensively to various journals, and national and international
conferences. As an educator, he has taught courses such as Cloud Computing,
Information Security, Advanced Computer Networks for M.Tech, and Application
Development using Python, Unix and Shell, System Programming, Computer Networks,
Object-Oriented Programming with C++/Java, and Web Programming for B.Tech
students. His research interests focus on High-Performance Computing in Cloud
Computing, Building a Frameworks for Virtual HPC Cloud Computing, Mobile Ad-Hoc
Networks, IoT, and Data Science.

about:
With over 27 years of academic and research experience in pharmaceutical
sciences, he has significantly contributed to pharmacy education, particularly
in the domains of Clinical Pharmacy, Pharmacotherapeutics, Clinical
Pharmacokinetics, and Pharmacy Practice Research. He has served as Chairperson
and Pharm.D Program Coordinator and played an instrumental role in curriculum
development, regulatory compliance, and academic quality assurance. His
leadership has fostered collaborations with national and international
institutions, notably Griffith University, Australia, and he has successfully
guided 18 M.Pharm. and 46 Pharm.D research projects. His research interests span
Novel Drug Delivery Systems, Clinical Pharmacy Practices, Pharmacovigilance, and
the application of digital health technologies in patient care. He has published
over 50 peer-reviewed papers in reputed journals and actively contributes as an
examiner, research mentor, and quality assurance leader within the pharmacy
education community. He is also recognised for integrating innovative teaching
methodologies, including simulation-based learning and digital tools for
healthcare education. Recent Publications Highlights: - Journal of Clinical
Oncology (IF 41.9) - Emergency Care Journal (Q4) - Prospects in Pharmaceutical
Sciences (Q3) - Indian Journal of Pharmacy Practice

about:
A passionate Teacher, started Teaching as a career in 1989 in the Department of
Electronics and Communication Engineering in P D A College of Engineering,
Gulbarga. Was fortunate to pursue PhD under the able Guidance of Prof. B N
Chatterji, E&ECE Department, IIT Kharagpur. Prof. B N Chatterji is one of the
Pioneers and first few for initiating research in Image Processing in India.
Apart from Teaching, Research interests include Image Processing, Control
Systems, blending Vedic Maths into Technology. Administrative experience include
6 years in Heading Engineering Institution as Principal at Jayaprakash Narayan
College of Engineering, Mahabubnagar. Department Head in PESIT Bangalore South
Campus since 2012. Have deep interests in rendering Scientific Insights to
Spirituality. Being Disciple of Spiritual Master H H Sri Sri Ravi Shankar and
Ambassador of Peace, have been senior faculty in The Art of Living (Volunteer
Organization), spreading the ancient wisdom of India and conducting Healing
Breath workshops across communities.

about:
Dr. Sudhamani M J is a Professor in the Department of Computer Science and
Engineering (AI & ML) at PES University, with over 22 years of academic and
research experience. She holds a PhD in Computer Science and Engineering from
VTU, with research focused on multimodal biometrics, machine learning, and image
processing. Her work spans pattern recognition, healthcare AI, and intelligent
systems, with over 17+ publications in reputed IEEE, Springer, and
Scopus-indexed journals, including a Best Paper Award at ICDAM-2021. She has
actively contributed to funded research projects, including proposals to
national agencies such as ANRF, AICTE, and WELLCO ME. Dr. Sudhamani has played
key leadership roles in curriculum design, accreditation (NBA & NAAC), and
industry collaborations with organizations like Infosys, KPIT, and Samsung
Innovation Campus. She is also the founder of student-driven initiatives such as
BigO Coding Club and GDG club, fostering innovation and technical excellence
among students. Her vision is to promote interdisciplinary, research-driven
education by integrating AI-driven pedagogy, industry collaboration, and
student-centered innovation. Actively mentoring students in AI, IoT, and
interdisciplinary research projects. Passionate about applying AI for societal
impact in healthcare and education.

about:
Obtained her B.Sc degree from Bangalore University and Secured University 8th
Rank. Obtained her M.Sc (Physics) degree from Bangalore University and Secured
University 2nd Rank. Obtained her M.S (By Research) degree from VIT University,
Chennai Campus. She was the first research student in the school of Electronics
Engineering, SENSE, to obtain a research degree from this campus. The area of
research being Memory Design and Testing. She obtained her Ph.D degree in
Electronics and Communication Engineering from PES University, Bengaluru. Her
research work was based on Buck and Boost Converters for low voltage
applications. She has also completed a Proficience course on Embedded System
Design from IISc, Bangalore. She has a total teaching experience of 35 years
with 32 years at PESIT/PES University. She has taught a variety of subjects at
both UG and PG level. She has authored more than 25 papers in International
Journals and Conferences. Her current interest is in Analog circuits, Power
Management Integrated circuits and Memory Design and Testing.

about:
Dr.S.Thenmozhi is a Professor in the Department of Computer Applications at PESU
since 2014. She has been in teaching profession from the year 2000. She obtained
her MCA degree in the year 2000 from Annamalai University, Chidambaram, M.Phil
from Bharathiar University, Coimbatore in the year 2004 and PhD from Anna
University, Chennai during 2014. She is qualified with SET. She has produced 6
MPhil graduates. She is recognized PhD supervisor at VTU and PESU. She is keen
interested in incubating the research talent among students. Her area of
interest is in Data Science and Machine Learning.

about:
Dr. D. Uma is a professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering,
PES University. She has over 25 years of association with P. E. S. Institutions.
She has 27 years of teaching experience and 17 years of research experience. She
obtained her Bachelor's degree from Bharathiar University, Coimbatore, Tamil
Nadu in 1993 and Master's degree from Bharathiar University in 1995. She has
obtained her Doctoral degree from Visvesvaraya Technological University,
Belgaum, Karnataka during 2011. She also obtained M. Tech. in Information
Technology from Karnataka State Open University, Mysore, Karnataka during 2015.
Her research areas include Data Science, Computer Vision, Machine Learning, Deep
Learning and Natural Language Processing. She has several journal articles,
national and international conference publications to her credit.

about:
Dr. Vamsi received his Ph.D. degree from the School of Computer Engineering,
Nanyang Technological University (NTU), Singapore in 2011. He worked as a
research associate in NTU (Feb-Oct 2011) and Hong Kong University of Science and
Technology (Nov 2011-Feb 2014). He is presently a Professor in the Department of
Electronics and Communications Engineering, PES University. He is also the Head
of Wireless Communications Networking (WiNC) domain. His research interests
include system design and automation, optimization, deep reinforcement learning
and scheduling algorithms in general. More specifically, he likes to design
large scale distributed services and applications over wireless networks. Dr.
Vamsi has published papers in reputed IEEE journals and international
conferences. He regularly reviews papers for IEEE Trans. on Smart Grid, IEEE
Trans. on Industrial Informatics, IEEE Trans. on Power Systems, International
Journal on Electric Power and Energy Systems and Applied Energy. He has also
reviewed many papers for other IEEE journals and conferences. Dr. Vamsi has held
several administrative responsibilities such as being Dept. coordinator for ABET
and IET accreditation for PES University (2015-16), Dept. coordinator for
faculty recruitment (2015), Dept. Coordinator for ECE curriculum and syllabus
(2015-Present) and Head of the Wireless Communication and Networking Domain
(2021-Present).

Cloud Security. She is a firm believer of Knowledge is power and have the zeal
to learn and explore new things. She has been recognized as a global mentor for

name: Dr. Bhaskarjyoti Das
research:
1. I am focused on research efforts with young, imaginative and curious minds who
are willing to think and eager to implement.
2. Interdisciplinary Machine learning with multiple contexts and sparse labelled
data in diverse domains such as Computational social science, Computational
Biology, Information Security, Urban Infrastructure Computing, Chem-informatics
etc.
3. Generative AI - Foundation Models and training, Thinking and reasoning agents
with memory, Boundaries of GEN AI
4. Algorithms and Optimizations in Machine Learning with Euclidean (text, image)
and Non-Euclidean data (graph). Semantics of multimodal data with knowledge
context.
5. Human Machine Interface - the complementary hemispheres of Biosignal (EEG, ECG,
EMG, fMRI, fNIRS) and Cognitive Science ( Memory, Attention, Cognitive Load,
Emotion)
6. Computational Biology and multiomics - Genomics, Proteomics, Transcriptomics,
Metabolomics and applications with the help of AI & ML
7. Computational Social Science - how algorithms and meaning construction affect
cultural cognition, identity, and behavior of individuals
8. I have a broad set of interests. I review for various Scopus-indexed Journals
such as Social Network Analysis and Mining, Humanities and Social Sciences
Communication, Discover Computing, Discover Data, Discover Artificial
Intelligence, Frontiers in Political Science, Frontiers in Human Dynamics, EPJ
Data Science etc.

about:
My primary passion is grooming young minds and making them realize their own
possibilities. I enjoy building competency (knowledge, process, mindset) and in
University, I am redoing what I did in corporate world. I am now a learner, an
educator and a researcher. I am one of the founding members of Dept of CSE (AI &
ML) in PES University and is part of it's growth story. As a research guide, I
participate actively instead of providing just executive guidance. I have worked
for 26+ years first in government R&D and then in industry in various roles in
all parts of the product life cycle i.e. consulting, professional services, and
engineering both as individual contributor and as manager/director. I have
worked both in system software and application software in diverse domains i.e.
networking, finance and automobile. So, I am comfortable with changing the
playground. My management experience has been mostly in product engineering and
change management in engineering organizations. Curiosity, constant learning,
and embracing changes are my key values. What I carry forward into the current
academic setup are my management training, deep and broad exposure to industry
(services and products), and ability to spot as well as mentor high-performers,
and lead from the front. I usually lose interest in the obvious. Through my
corporate years, I developed a keen interest in the macro patterns instead of
the corporate ladder and my current passion in research is a continuation of
that journey. My LinkedIn Profile :
https://www.linkedin.com/in/bhaskarjyoti/?originalSubdomain=in

about:
With 15 years of academic experience and an additional 2 years of industry
expertise, Prof. Animesh brings a well-rounded perspective to the role of
Computer Science Engineering faculty and Faculty Placement & Internship
Coordinator. Extensive background in academia equips Prof. Animesh with a deep
understanding of the educational needs and aspirations of students, allowing for
the effective bridging of the gap between classroom learning and real-world
application. The 2 years of industry experience provide valuable insights into
the demands and expectations of the professional world, which Prof. Animesh
leverages to prepare students for successful careers. As a Placement &
Internship Coordinator, Prof. Animesh is dedicated to establishing strong
industry partnerships, crafting meaningful internship opportunities, and
providing students with the guidance and support needed to excel in their chosen
fields. The commitment is to empower students with the skills and knowledge
necessary for a seamless transition from academia to industry, ultimately
contributing to their career success.

about:
Dr. Anitha Jandhyala is an accomplished academic with over 22 years of teaching
experience in Mathematics and allied disciplines. She holds a Ph.D. from Vellore
Institute of Technology, where her research focused on “Multi-Objective
Optimization using Statistical and Soft Computing Techniques in Electro
Discharge Machining.” Her academic journey includes a Master’s in Mathematics
from JNTU Hyderabad, an M.Phil. from Madurai Kamaraj University, a B.Ed. from
Bangalore University, and an MBA from Madurai Kamaraj University. Dr. Anitha has
previously served as an Assistant Professor at PES University and as an Adjunct
Professor at New Jersey City University, USA, where she taught Pre-Calculus and
Calculus to management students. Since January 2021, she has been serving as an
Associate Professor at PES University, Bangalore. Her teaching interests span
mathematics education, optimization techniques, and the integration of
statistical and computational methods in applied research.

about:
Dr. Biplab Sarkar has an economics degree from the University of North Bengal,
Darjeeling. He, later on, completed his Ph.D. from the Indian Statistical
Institute, Bangalore. As a teacher, he has taught courses like statistics,
applied econometrics, R-programming, predictive analytics, research methodology,
micro and macroeconomics for M.Sc. (Applied Economics) and MBA students. His
primary research area is at the intersection between policy and development
economics. He has presented his research work in national and international
conferences including the World Association for Political Economy (WAPE)
Conference at the Federal University of Santa Catarina(UFSC), Florianopolis,
Brazil, and the Association for Regional Agriculture and Forestry Economics
(ARAE) conference at the Okayama University, Japan. He has also served as a
consultant to the Foundation for Agrarian Studies (FAS), M S Swaminathan
Research Foundation (MSSRF), and World Food Programme (WFP), leading
organizations facilitate research on rural and development issues.

about:
Dr. Chandrashekhar P Chavan received his B.E. degree in Computer Science and
Engineering from Guru Nanak Dev Engineering College, Bidar, Karnataka, India,
and his M.Tech degree in Network and Internet Engineering from Sri
Jayachamarajendra College of Engineering, Mysore, Karnataka, India, where he
secured the 3rd rank in the university. He later earned his Ph.D. in the field
of Wireless Networking from the Indian Institute of Science (IISc), Bangalore,
India. His core research interests include Wireless Networks, Mobile Ad-Hoc
Networks (MANETs), IoT, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AIML),
Cloud Computing, Ubiquitous Networks, Network Security, Pervasive Computing,
Context-Aware Systems, and Post-Quantum Cryptography.

about:
Dr. Chetana Srinivas is an Associate professor in the Department of Computer
Science and Engineering (AI & ML), PES University, RR Campus, Bengaluru. She has
17 years of teaching experience and 6 years of research experience. She received
her bachelor's degree and Master's degree in Computer Science and Engineering
from Visvesvaraya Technological University, Belagavi. She obtained her Doctoral
Degree from Visvesvaraya Technological University in Faculty of Computer and
Information Sciences, Belagavi. Her current research interests include Deep
Learning, Machine Learning, Image Processing and Big Data Analytics. She has
published various patents. Published articles in reputed international journals
and Conferences. She is a reviewer for various international conferences and
journals. She is a life member of Indian Society for Technical Education and
Institution of Engineers.

about:
Dr. M.S.Dinesh is the Associate Professor, Department of Biotechnology (UG & PG
Studies) at P E S University, Bangalore. He completed Ph.d., degree from Indian
Institute of Horticultural Research (IIHR), Bangalore in the field of cell
culture product as biopesticides and biofertilizers with the best thesis award
from Indian Councial of Agricultural Research (ICAR) New Delhi. He has done his
post doctural research programme at centre for sustainable technologies, Indian
Institute of Science, Bangalore in the field of therapeutic peptides from
indigenous mesofauna awarded first place in the biopharmaceutics area by
DBT-Government of India. He has completed his master degree in life sciences
with first class from Bangalore University. He has 17 years of teaching and 20
years of research experience.He has handled many course subjects in the field of
Biopharmaceuticals, Food Biotechnology, Agricultural Biotechnology, Animal
Biotechnology, Environmental Biotechnology , Molecular biology and Genetic
Engineering. He is recognized guide for PES University and VTU to guide M.Sc.,
(Engg.,) Research and Ph.D., students. He has 13 International, 04 national
Journal publications, also 12 International 32 National conference publications
secured many best research paper awards. He is in the edutorial board of Indian
Journal of applied research, Korean National centre for research resource, Indo
frech cell for organic waste management, Life member Indian Society for
Technical Education (ISTE), Society for Biological Chemistry (SBC), Association
for advancement in Horticultural Ecosystem (AAPMHE), Indian Society for Soil
Biology and Ecology (ISSBE). Selected as a trainee researcher by Biocon academy.
Presented research innovations at Chung ang university, Seoul, Korea, Krakov,
Poland. He has awarded sponcered research projects in the field of
bippharmaceuitcs by VTU, RGUHS, ISHWM, AICTE MDROB.

about:
A passionate academician with over 20 years of rich experience in teaching,
research, and academic leadership, currently serving as an Associate Professor
in the Department of CSE(AI&ML) at PES University, EC Campus, Bangalore. My core
research interests lie in Cybersecurity, Blockchain, Internet of Things (IoT),
Machine Learning applications in Security, Wireless Sensor Networks, Adhoc
Networks, and Data Science. I have made significant scholarly contributions with
18 research publications in reputed refereed journals and 30 papers presented at
national and international conferences. Throughout my career, I have
demonstrated a strong commitment to academic excellence by guiding more than 60
undergraduate project batches and over 15 postgraduate research projects.
Actively organized Faculty Development Programs (FDPs), technical workshops, and
seminars on emerging technologies and has been a sought-after guest speaker and
seminar resource person in various institutions. An active member of leading
professional bodies including IEEE, ACM, IE(India), and ISTE. Known for passion
for mentoring and research-driven teaching, continues to inspire students and
contribute to advancing the frontiers of computing and intelligent systems.

about:
Dr. Gokulakrishnan S is an Associate Professor in the field of Computer Science,
with over 19 years of academic experience encompassing teaching, research, and
academic administration. He completed his Postdoctoral Research in Artificial
Intelligence and Data Analytics in 2022 at Ton Duc Thang University and the
Industrial University of Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam. His postdoctoral work
focused on advanced AI methodologies and data-driven analytical frameworks. Dr.
Gokulakrishnan earned his Doctor of Philosophy (Ph.D.) in Computer Science and
Engineering in 2021 from Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology, Tamil
Nadu. His doctoral research specialized in Cloud Computing, with an emphasis on
system scalability, efficiency, and performance optimization. He holds both a
Bachelor’s degree and a Master’s degree in Information Technology, providing a
strong academic foundation in computing technologies and systems. Dr.
Gokulakrishnan has made significant scholarly contributions through publications
in Web of Science (WoS) and Scopus-indexed journals, and through presentations
at several international conferences. His research reflects a balance between
theoretical rigor and practical applicability. In addition to his research
contributions, he is a committed educator and mentor, dedicated to academic
excellence and the professional development of students. His teaching philosophy
emphasizes critical thinking, innovation, and preparedness for emerging
challenges in the digital and technological landscape.

filed and published.

about:
Dr. Jhinuk Chatterjee obtained her Ph.D. in Biotechnology from Department of
Life Sciences & Biotechnology from Jadavpur University , Kolkata. Her major area
of research is Computational Biology, Systems Biology, Cellular Imaging and
Computational Immunology. University merit scholarship and academic excellence
award were awarded to her during graduation and post graduation studies. Her PhD
work was focused on analyzing antigenic variations in human spermatozoa and drug
interaction. After completion of her PhD she worked as full time post doctoral
researcher in Bioinformatics Center, Indian Institute of Science, Bangalore. In
Indian institute of Science she has worked on in silico analysis of putative
drug targets in Mycobacterium tuberculosis H37Rv. Dr Jhinuk has reviewed papers
from various journals like Computers in Biology and Medicine, Current
Bioinformatics, Environmental Toxicology & Pharmacology, Aspects of Molecular
Medicine, Medicine in Omics, Briefings in Bioinformatics, Nature Scientific
Reports etc. She has published research papers in various journals of good
repute. She has guided several UG and PG students for their projects. She has
also guided PhD students who worked on analyzing influence of micro-environment
on cells and analyzing inhibitory activity of anticancer inhibitors.

about:
Dr. Kaustav Bhowmick specializes in the field of Photonic devices, Photonic
materials and optical technology. Post-PhD (University of Nottingham, UK, 2013),
he has worked as Assistant Professor, in National Institute of Technology,
Sikkim (2013-2015) and Amrita School of Engineering, Amrita Vishwavidyapeetham
Deemed University, Bengaluru (2016-2019). During the said period, Dr. Bhowmick
has been instrumental in setting up Photonics research laboratory, MoUs with
national and international universities, supervising UG, PG and PhD students,
and 1ing research in national and international journals and conferences. His
project students have been recruited in well-known international and national
universities and in companies like Bosch. Dr. Bhowmick has done research with
some well-known names in Photonics, both in India and abroad. Currently, in PES
University, his target is to drive research in Photonic and related quantum
technologies, preferably in a interdisciplinary manner. Website:
https://sites.google.com/view/drbhowmickphotonics

name: Dr. Kavitha P
about:
Dr. P. Kavitha is an Associate Professor in the Department of Computer Science
and Engineering. She received her Ph.D. from Anna University, Chennai, India,
for her research on Anomaly-based Intrusion Detection in 802.11 Networks with
Optimal Feature Selection. With an academic career that began in December 1998,
she brings over 23 years of rich experience in teaching and research. She is a
recognized Research Supervisor at Visvesvaraya Technological University (VTU)
and PES University, Karnataka, and has successfully guided two doctoral scholars
under VTU. Her research interests span Network security, Anomaly detection,
Machine Learning and Feature optimization in wireless networks. Dr. Kavitha is a
life member of the Indian Society for Technical Education (ISTE) and IEEE
(India). Her commitment to advancing knowledge, mentoring young researchers, and
contributing to the academic community has earned her recognition as a dedicated
teacher and researcher.

about:
I am Dr. Kokila Paramanandam, currently working as an Associate Professor in the
Department of CSE-AIML at PES University, Bangalore. I bring over 16 years of
academic experience, and my teaching portfolio spans a diverse range of subjects
including Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Generative AI, Cloud Computing, and
Computer Networks & Security among some others. My research interests are
centered around Artificial Intelligence, Explainable AI, Computer Vision, Cloud
Computing, and the Internet of Things. I’ve published my work extensively in
SCI-indexed journals and leading international conferences, and I also hold a
patent in the domain of Artificial Intelligence. Beyond teaching and research, I
actively contribute to institutional development through roles such as Program
Coordinator and Academic Committee Member. I’ve organized and supported various
technical events, guest lectures, and student hackathons, and have also served
as an External Deputy Chief Superintendent (DCS) for VTU Theory Examinations
across multiple engineering colleges in Bangalore. I’m passionate about
continuous faculty development and regularly take part in FDPs and technical
workshops. I’m technically proficient in Python, TensorFlow, Keras, OpenCV,
MATLAB, and scikit-learn, with deep expertise in AI/ML and image processing
tools. I’m a life member of the Indian Society for Technical Education (ISTE)
and have been recognized for my contributions in academic mentoring, curriculum
development, and technical design. I’ve had the opportunity to guide several
innovative and socially relevant student projects, including Multimodal
Context-Aware Suspicious Activity Detection, Automated Irrigation Systems, 3D
Building Construction Models, Reliable Medical Image Segmentation, Adaptive
Conversational AI, Automatic Vehicle Detection and Monitoring, AR Glasses for
Dyslexic Individuals etc. Additionally, I’ve successfully secured funding from
the Karnataka State Council for Science and Technology (KSCST) to support
impactful student projects and research initiatives. My professional journey is
driven by a strong passion for creating interdisciplinary, real-world learning
experiences and for leveraging emerging technologies to solve meaningful
societal problems.

about:
Dr. Krishna Kumar S, an accomplished Associate Professor with a passion for
driving excellence in higher education and the world of finance. Currently, I
have the privilege of leading the Centre for Investment in Capital Markets,
where we offer Certification courses, conduct Investment analysis, and engage in
cutting-edge Research within the dynamic realm of capital markets. My expertise
encompasses a broad spectrum, including equities, derivatives, accounting, and
financial econometrics. I thrive on harnessing the power of data analysis to
extract actionable insights, utilizing an impressive array of analytical tools
such as EViews, R, Tally ERP, STATA, IBM SPSS, SPSS-AMOS, JMP, and Smart PLS.
This skill enables me to uncover meaningful patterns within intricate financial
data, setting me apart as a leading expert in the field. My key areas of
research focus on Market Microstructures, Corporate Finance Issues, and
Derivatives Modeling. I am deeply committed to advancing knowledge in these
diverse areas, pushing the boundaries of understanding in finance. My research
not only contributes to academic discourse but also holds practical implications
for businesses and financial institutions. Beyond my technical prowess, I am a
dedicated educator with a fervor for bridging the gap between theory and
practice. I leverage educational technology and instructional design to create
engaging learning experiences, equipping students with valuable practical
skills. My commitment to cultivating a dynamic classroom environment that
fosters critical thinking and active participation has garnered recognition from
both students and peers. My academic journey culminated in a PhD in Finance,
where I refined my exceptional ability to dissect complex financial concepts and
make them accessible to diverse audiences. I am unwavering in my dedication to
empowering the next generation of finance professionals with the knowledge and
tools they need to excel in today's ever-evolving business landscape.

about:
Dr.Lucas M - is a Associate Professor @ PES University in the Department of MBA
and formerly he served as Senior Assistant Professor at Xavier Institute of
Management and Entrepreneurship and prior to this formerly he was with Ramaiah
Institute of Management Studies from 2008-2018. He received his PhD in Human
Capital Management from Alagappa University, karaikudi, Tamilnadu. He is
specialized in HR, OB and Labour Law and has undergone practical Laboratory
training in Applied Psychology. He has 20 years of both Industry and Academic
experience. He has undergone his training in International certification in
Training Skills conducted by Middle Earth consultants from Hyderabad which is
associated with City and Guild, London. He has conducted Soft Skills Training
program and MDP for young Engineers in HAL and for Software Engineers at BAe HAL
and in BHEL and delivered more than 75 MDP and FDP Trainings. Designed and
delivered more than 20 orientation programs in Karnataka Judicial Academy to the
second division Assistants, Govt. Lawyers, Junior Judges, Civil Judges - Junior
Division, Civil judges, Senior Civil Judges, District Judges and fast track
court Judges in the area of Team Building, Stress and Time management, Human
Resources and Management skills in the Judiciary (2008-2013). More than 35 paper
publications in leading Management journals of repute indexed by Scopus and UGC
care listed Journals.

about:
Dr. Manjula Devananda is an interdisciplinary AI researcher and academician with
expertise in health informatics, machine learning, and explainable AI. She holds
a Ph.D. from the University of Otago, New Zealand, where her research focused on
predictive workload modelling in primary healthcare. With a strong background in
both academia and industry, she has served as Senior Manager – AI Research at
Fusemachines (USA), Health Data Scientist in New Zealand, and Principal/Academic
Director at KVM Institutions, India. Her teaching experience spans institutions
in India, New Zealand, and Canada. Dr. Manjula has delivered numerous keynote
talks, served on technical committees, and received several prestigious
fellowships including the Otago Doctoral Scholarship and Callaghan Innovation
Grant. Her research contributions are published in reputed international
journals and conferences. She is passionate about AI education, research
mentorship, and developing impactful, ethical AI systems across disciplines.

about:
Dr. Radhika M. Hirannaiah is an Associate Professor at PES University (RR
Campus) in Bangalore, India. She earned her PhD from Wichita State University in
Kansas, USA, and brings over 10 years of industry experience in software
development, testing, automation, and support for computer networking products.
She has held positions at prominent organizations, including Cisco, Palo Alto
Networks, various startups, and in Linux Foundation open-source projects. She
brings over six years of experience in teaching high school, undergraduate, and
graduate-level courses, along with delivering virtual online training. Her
research interests are centered on cutting-edge technologies, including
software-defined networking (SDN), Voice over Internet Protocol (VoIP), and 5G
technology. She is committed to advancing knowledge in these fields and uses her
extensive expertise to inspire and mentor her students in Network Security and
5G applications. She is a self-motivated and proactive team player, recognized
for her versatility and excellent interpersonal skills.

about:
Prof. Rajasekar Mohan is an Associate Professor at PES University Bangalore. His
research interests include wireless communications, healthcare systems and
embedded systems. He manages the Microsoft Innovation Lab at the PES University.
It is a research lab for the students of PES University where students develop
innovative projects during Summer Internships. He handholds student projects in
several domains viz. Robotics, IoT, Machine Learning, Sensor Networks and
Virtual Reality. Prof. Rajasekar is also the Nokia Faculty Champion for PES
University. He collaborates with Nokia for various technology projects for
students in Communication and activities of interest to both academia and the
industry. He is the coordinator for e-Yantra competitions conducted by Indian
Institute of Technology, Bombay for PESU. He is also the coordinator for various
University Collaboration activities organized by ITU at PESU. As a part of the
Microsoft Innovation Lab and Dept of ECE, several 24-hr hackathons are regularly
conducted successfully in the campus.

name: Dr. Richa Sharma
about:
Dr. Richa Sharma worked as an Assistant Professor at PES University, T John
College, Bangalore, and PCTE Group of Institutes, Ludhiana. She holds a master's
degree in technology (M. Tech) and master’s and bachelor’s degrees in computer
applications (MCA, BCA). With nine years of experience in teaching and training
MCA, MBA, and B.E. students, her interests lie in researching new technologies,
teaching, and mentoring to help groom new talent with the required skillset. She
has publications in various national and international conferences and journals
of repute. With a PhD in Computer Science & Engineering (CSE), specializing in
Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Machine Learning/Deep Learning (ML/DL),
she is currently an Associate Professor at PES University, Bangalore. Her
primary research focus is on Natural Language Processing, Machine Learning, Deep
Learning, Generative AI, Large Language Models, Retrieval Augmented Generation
etc. —areas she has long been passionate about and where she finds immense
excitement in applying these technologies to tackle significant challenges in
the digital landscape. During her PhD, she conducted pioneering research in fake
news detection, particularly in the Hindi language. In addition to her research,
she has mentored numerous projects, resulting in the publication of several
papers in respected conferences and journals, thereby contributing to the
academic community and advancing the field.

in integration of science with architecture is the way forward. He has been
actively involved in Question paper setting, Valuation and Jury in various
reputed universities/colleges in India. He is a practicing Architect and partner
in an Architectural practice, involved in projects spread throughout Karnataka.

Dr. Shashidhara M is an accomplished academician and researcher in Spintronics,
VLSI Design, and Emerging Memory Technologies. He earned his Ph.D. in
Spintronics from the National Institute of Technology (NIT) Surat, where his
doctoral research focused on energy-efficient Spin-Orbit Torque Magnetic Tunnel
Junctions (SOT-MTJs) and Logic-in-Memory (LiM) architectures. He holds a B.E. in
Electronics and Communication Engineering and an M.Tech. in VLSI & Embedded
Systems from VTU. With over 15 years of teaching experience and extensive
research contributions, he has published multiple papers in prestigious journals
such as IEEE Transactions on CAD, IEEE TED, IEEE TDMR, and Elsevier.

about:
Dr. Shruthi M.L.J. is an esteemed Associate Professor in the Department of
Electronics and Communication Engineering at PES University, Bengaluru. With a
profound dedication to advancing the field of Electronics and Communication, Dr.
Shruthi has made significant contributions, particularly in the realm of Image
and Video Processing. Her academic journey is marked by a Doctoral Degree from
Visvesvaraya Technological University, where she specialized in Image and Video
Processing, and a Master's degree from Dr. Ambedkar Institute of Technology,
focusing on VLSI & Embedded systems Design. Dr. Shruthi's scholarly work is
well-recognized in the academic community, underscored by her numerous Scopus
Indexed papers and patents. One of her notable achievements include receiving
the Best Paper Award for her paper titled 'Non-Parametric histogram based skin
modeling,' at the IEEE ICCIC 2013. Her current research endeavors are in the
cutting-edge areas of video processing and AI-VLSI, showcasing her commitment to
integrating artificial intelligence with VLSI design. Her leadership and
expertise have also been recognized on international platforms, having chaired a
session in International Conference RAAI-2023, Singapore.

about:
Dr. Shruti Soudi holds a PhD in Positive Psychology from Karnatak University and
has a background in counseling psychology. Her academic journey includes a
Master's degree in Counseling Psychology and a Master of Philosophy in Health
Psychology from Karnatak University. Dr. Soudi has a diverse range of
professional experiences. She has worked as a Mental Health Specialist at
Inspiron Psychological Well-being Centre Pvt Ltd and as an Associate SME at
Evelyn Learning Systems Pvt. Ltd. Additionally, she has been a Guest Associate
Editor at Frontiers in Media Psychology since August 2023. Her research focuses
on familial dynamics and parenting strategies, exploring their impact on
children's emotional well-being. She has also contributed to various studies on
topics such as personality, coping with stress, spirituality, self-esteem, and
forgiveness among musicians and students.

2. Transportation problems
teaching:
1. Taught various subjects like Engineering Mathematics, Calculus, Differential

about:
I’m Dr. Tania Bose, a passionate mathematician and educator with a Ph.D. from
Panjab University, Chandigarh, where my research focused on mathematical
modeling of creep in composite materials for engineering applications. My
academic journey began with a B.Sc. and M.Sc. in Mathematics from Panjab
University, followed by a Ph.D. completed in 2018. I earned JRF and SRF from
CSIR, New Delhi to persue PhD. As an active researcher, I’ve published
extensively in high-impact journals like the European Journal of Mechanics and
International Journal of Applied Mechanics and hold 20 patents including design
and utility, showcasing my innovative spirit. My teaching experience spans over
15 years across diverse institutions and it’s been an awesome journey. I joined
as an Associate Professor in PES University, RR Campus in May 2025. Before that,
I was serving as a Professor at Chitkara University, Punjab, following my time
as an Associate Professor there from 2019 to 2022. Before that, I was an
Assistant Professor at Chitkara University from 2010 to 2014 and a Lecturer at
G.G.S. College of Modern Technology, Kharar, from 2006 to 2010. During my Ph.D.,
I taught as a Research Scholar and later as a Guest Lecturer at the University
Institute of Engineering and Technology, Panjab University, from 2014 to 2019.
My teaching covers a broad spectrum of mathematical disciplines like Engineering
Maths and Discrete Maths. I was consecutively the unit chair for 5 years in a
twin program run by Deakin University, Australia. I have conducted several
workshops on Vedic Maths, Latex writing and MATLAB. My efforts have been
recognized with awards like the Best Oral Presentation at Chandigarh Science
Congress and research awards presented by Panjab University for publishing
papers in high impact journals.

about:
Dr. Veerabhadraswamy Mruthyunjaya , (VBS) born in Bengaluru, did his Masters in
Chemistry in the year 1994 and Ph. D., in 2002 from University of Mysore and
obtained PG Diploma in Environmental Law in 2020 and Masters in Business Law
(MBL) degree from National Law of Indian Universities, Bengaluru in the year
2017. Presently, he is working as Associate Professor of Chemistry, P E S
University. His current research field engages green chemistry which includes
conversion of biomass (non-edible seed cake and defatted rice bran) into
bio-fuels, chemical intermediates using heterogeneous catalysts and conversion
of waste to bio-composites. His projects have been funded by VTU Belagavi, AICTE
New Delhi, and VGST-KIST (L1) Bengaluru. Dr. VBS has served as Post Doctoral
Research Assistant under Dr. Gary N Sheldrake, Queen University Belfast, Belfast
UK in the field of green technology (Supercritical fluid extraction). Dr. VBS
has about three and half years of industrial research experience in the field of
nutraceutical and natural products. In net shall, he has 25 years of vast
experience as an academician, administrator and as researcher. Under his
guidance two research students have obtained Ph D degrees from VTU, Belagavi,
and presently guiding Ph. D students, PG and UG students. He has been actively
involved in GREEN CHMISTRY DOMAN activity promotion. Dr. VBS has presented
research articles in conferences and 1ed research papers in various
International and Nations Journals, His recent innovation in the field of
catalyst has resulted in filing patent. He has authored books and Book Chapters
in the field of green chemistry and its applications. He has few honors and
recognitions to his credits.

Cybersecurity, Cloud Computing, and Data Analytics.

name: Dr. Amina Khan
research:
1. My research focus on establishing strategy for allocating resources and optimal
placement of a group of UAVs to offer wider wireless coverage area for Disaster
Management System. It also focus on developing a collaborative approach between
multi-UAVs and SAR Team to boost connectivity between them and to efficiently
govern the disaster area.
teaching:
1. For B. Tech: Digital Communication
2. For B. Tech: Computer Communication Networks
about:
Amina Khan received her B. Tech degree in Electronics and Communication
Engineering from Islamic University of Science and Technology, Jammu & Kashmir,
India in 2015 and M. Tech degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering
from Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University, Jammu & Kashmir, India in 2017. She
received her Ph.D. in the Department of Electronics & Communication Engineering
from Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University, katra, India on research topic 'Unified
self-configurable network architecture optimized for disaster detection and
recovery', in 2023. Her area of interest is Wireless Sensor Network, Mobile
Ad-Hoc Networks and UAV Networks. She has published many articles in the reputed
International journals and prestigious conference proceedings, and an author of
many book chapters as well. She has been serving as a reviewer for several
leading journals under Wiley and Elsevier.

about:
Dr. Anagha K. Kowshik obtained her Ph.D. degree from PES University in Dec. 2024
in the domain of Signal processing for wireless communications. She received her
B. E. degree in Telecommunication Engineering from PES Institute of Technology,
Bengaluru under Visvesvaraya Technological University, Belgaum, and the M. Tech.
degree in Signal Processing (ECE) from PES University, Bengaluru. She is
currently an Assistant professor in the department of Electronics and
Communication Engineering at PES University, Bengaluru. She has close to 4 years
of industry experience and 5 years of research experience. Her research
interests include signal processing for wireless communications, MIMO systems,
advanced multiple access techniques such as NOMA and RSMA, machine learning for
communication systems, radar communications, Kalman filtering, and integrated
sensing and communications. She has published several papers in reputed journals
and conferences. She is the recipient of the Protsahan Award 2024 from IEEE
ComSoc Bangalore Chapter.

about:

PhD degree from Dibrugarh University on “Mathematical Modelling of Transmission
Dynamics and Control of Infectious Diseases”. She has 12.5 years of teaching and

about:
Anuradha S Pai is post graduate in Economics, currently working as Chairperson &
Assistant Professor in Commerce & Economics at the Faculty of Management &
Commerce, PES University, RR campus. She is pursuing her PhD in Health Economics
from Symbiosis International University, Pune in the area of Organ Donation and
the Impact of Nudges. Her specialization is Development Economics, law and
Economics, International Trade and Public Economics. She teaches Economics
papers like Managerial Economics, law and Economics, Business Economics,
Macroeconomics across departments of MBA, Law, Commerce at PES University. With
a teaching experience of 9 years, she is a self driven individual and have
demonstrated history of handling both graduate and post graduate students. Her
commitment and passion towards teaching and also institution building and
networking, makes her stand out from the crowd. She has more than 4 papers and

about:
Dr. Ashwini H. R. obtained her Ph.D. degree from PES University in Dec. 2024 in
the domain of Signal processing for wireless communications. She received her B.
E. degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering from RNS Institute of
Technology, Bengaluru under Visvesvaraya Technological University, Belgaum, and
the M. Tech. degree in Signal Processing (ECE) from PES University, Bengaluru.
She is currently an Assistant professor in the department of Electronics and
Communication Engineering at PES University, Bengaluru. Her research interests
are in the areas of signal processing for wireless communications, MIMO, spatial
modulation techniques, intelligent reflecting surfaces and machine learning
techniques for communication systems. She has published papers in reputed
journals and conferences. She is the recipient of the Protsahan Award 2024 from
IEEE ComSoc Bangalore Chapter, and the co-recipient of Prof. T. K. Sarkar
memorial best paper award in antennas and RF technologies for next-gen
communications track in INDICON 2022.
