name: Dr. Bhaskar Sailesh
about:
Dr. Bhaskar Sailesh is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Hospitality
and Event Management at PES University, Bangalore. His academic and research
interests encompass a wide range of areas including sustainable tourism
development, event management, hospitality operations, organizational behavior,
and the integration of emerging technologies such as AI and analytics in the
tourism and hospitality sectors. He has authored several research papers and
book chapters on topics such as coastal tourism resilience, digital branding,
employee motivation in luxury hotels, and technology-driven climate adaptation.
In addition to his academic work, Bhaskar is actively involved in student
mentorship, industry-academia collaborations, and practical learning
initiatives. He regularly guides students through live event projects, research
assignments, and skill development workshops, fostering a strong link between
theoretical knowledge and real-world application. His approach emphasizes
interdisciplinary learning, global perspectives, and preparing students for the
dynamic demands of the hospitality, tourism, and events industries.

engineering applications.

name: Meghana Satish
research:
1. Interdisciplinary design education l Communication design l Humanities
Integration l Cultural and artistic practices l Historical and cultural contexts
l Critical approaches to creative practices.
teaching: 1. Design Fundamentals l Fashion Communication l Branding Identity & Systems
about:
Based in Bangalore, India, I am an Assistant Professor of Communication Design,
specializing in undergraduate courses such as Design Fundamentals, Fashion
Communication, Interactive design, and visual identity systems. Professionally,
I have collaborated with brands including Unilever brands, Tinder, Philips,
Facebook Watch etc. My tenure as an Art Director at Target Corporation, India,
honed my skills in art direction and brand strategy. Currently, I lead
BottleCap, a multidisciplinary design studio delivering brand identity, website
design, art direction, and packaging solutions. My research focuses on combining
different fields to improve design education and exploring how communication
design connects with the humanities in academic settings. I am particularly
interested in understanding the cultural and historical backgrounds of artistic
practices. By using various theories and critical methods, I aim to highlight
how historical and cultural contexts influence creative work.

name: NIKHIL MANIKANDAN
teaching:
1. Production & Operations Management
2. International Business
about:
As an individual, I am focused, driven, and passionate about everything I do. I
am committed to continuous learning and development, both professionally and
personally, and I believe in leading by example. I believe in a hands-on
approach to learning, which is reflected in my passion for organizing
intra-university and inter-university management fests, coordinating sports
activities for the students of the management department, conducting research on
various management concerns, and working along with students to find optimum
solutions for the issues. I have also helped students generate new business
ideas and kick-start their businesses. As an Assistant Professor in Business
Management at PES University, Bangalore. I am a driven and dedicated individual
who is passionate about developing a curriculum that is industry-centric,
producing competitive business leaders, and achieving experiential learning
through industry and academic networking. I have had the privilege of serving as
the Chief Operations Leader of CODISTA Taekwondo Academy in Coimbatore, Tamil
Nadu. My primary goal was to develop the organization holistically, and I
achieved this by reducing the operating expenses by 50%, improving the quality
of training and coaches by changing coach to student ratio from 1:40 to 3:40,
and training and developing the existing human resources to achieve a 20%
improvement in productivity. Additionally, I diversified the academy's products
and services, established an online presence through social media, and developed
efficient SOPs for processes, reducing the operation cost by 30%. Before my role
as Chief Operations Leader of CODISTA, I worked as the Regional (South India)
Business Manager at Bhaichung Bhutia Football Schools in Bangalore. I maintained
a positive PnL even during Covid times, minimized expenses by 50%, and generated
revenue through online training strategies contributing 80% of total sales. I
successfully opened two new training centers and four inactive centers in my
region and retained unsatisfied users with a 60% retention rate. During my time
at Reliance Trends, Kochi, I served as the Store/Cluster Manager. I recruited
and supervised ten quality staff with an attrition rate of 10% in 2020 and
organized eight pieces of training on multiple topics to upskill employees. I
exceeded the revenue objectives for the year 2020, maintained the stock accuracy
level of 91%, and contributed 20% of total sales from AJIO. I have also worked
as a Part-Time Professor at Padmashree Institute of Management and Sciences,
Bangalore, where I developed two management training programs for BBA and B.Com
students, trained 30 MBA students on the Performance Management System, and
developed a curriculum to cultivate entrepreneurial skills and moral courage in
students. I also conducted two sessions of physical activity for BBA and B.Com
students per week and made over 500 cold calls for admission generation with
three average leads per day. My education includes a Bachelor of Technology
degree in Business Management with Computer Application and a Master of Business
Administration degree in Marketing and Human Resources from Bharathiar
University. I am passionate about continuing my learning journey.
education:

Vidyalaya Institute of Management (Bharathiar University), 2013 - 2015
2. Bachelor of Business Management With Computer Application, AJK College of Arts &
Science (Bharathiar University), 2010 - 2013

name: Rashmi N Ugarakhod
about:
Dr. Rashmi N U received B.E. degree in electronics and communication from
Visvesvaraya Technological University, India, M. Tech. degree in Intelligent
Systems from PESIT, Bangalore and the Ph. D. degree in engineering from the PES
University, Bangalore, India. She is currently an Assistant Professor of
Electronics and Communication Engineering at PES University, Bangalore. Her
research interests include Image Processing, Computer vision, Machine Learning,
Deep Learning, System Identification, Control algorithms for robotics and many
other applications.

name: Ravikrishnan E M
about:
Ravikrishnan E. M. is an Assistant Professor of Law at PES University with three
years of teaching and two years of courtroom practice. He currently teaches the
IT Act and Cyber Laws, Administrative Law, and the Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha
Sanhita (BNSS). Earlier, he taught Environmental Law, Gender Justice, and ADR at
other universities. A PhD scholar, he researches how AI can strengthen Online
Dispute Resolution, and his findings appear in UGC-CARE and Scopus-indexed
journals.

about:
Shahid Aziz received B.E. in Electronics Engineering from University of Pune in
2009, M.Tech. in Communication Engineering from West Bengal University of
Technology in 2014 and earned his Ph.D. from NIT Patna in August 2025. He served
as an Assistant Professor at Maulana Azad College of Engineering and Technology,
Patna for nearly a decade in various capacities until September 2023. In October
2023, Shahid Aziz joined PES University, Bengaluru, as Assistant Professor in
the Department of Electronics & Communication Engineering. His research
interests are primarily focused on speech and audio processing, with a specific
emphasis on Speaker Verification Systems for children. Currently, his research
revolves around developing a robust short-utterance based children’s speaker
verification system. Mr. Aziz is an active member of professional organizations
such as the Indian Society for Technical Education (ISTE), IEEE, IEEE Signal
Processing Society, International Speech Communication Association
(ISCA).Outside of academia, he has been appointed to the role of an NTA Observer
for the National Testing Agency, Ministry of Education, Government of India. In
this capacity, since 2019, he has monitored the conduct of prestigious
national-level high-stakes entrance examinations for admission/fellowship in
higher educational institutions in India and abroad.

about:
Dr. Shobha Rani. M, is an aspiring professional academician with a steadfast
commitment and profound passion for teaching law. Her journey in academia is
characterized by a dedication to enriching legal education through rigorous
scholarship and transformative pedagogical approaches. She has pursued her Ph.D.
in Law in 2021 from University Law College & Dept. of Studies in Law, Bangalore
University on the Topic – “A Critical Study on the Constitutional Principle of
Secularism in India with Special reference to Endowments”. She pursued her
post-graduation in Law. Her specialization is Constitutional Law and Legal
Order. She teaches papers like Constitutional Law, Personal Laws, Administrative
Law, Jurisprudence, Interpretation of Statutes. She had an overall experience of
10 years of teaching in law. Currently she is working as an Assistant Professor
in Faculty of Law, PES University, RR Campus, Bengaluru. She has published
Articles in National and International, Peer-reviewed Journals and also
participated and presented research papers in various State, National and
International level Seminars, Workshops and Conferences. She is interested in
multi-disciplinary legal research especially women related issues.

name: Shreya Ghosh
about:
Shreya Ghosh is an Assistant Professor and dedicated PhD scholar in Psychology,
specializing in Counselling and Industrial Psychology. She holds a master’s
degree in psychology and is certified in Counselling, Hypnotherapy, Industrial
Psychology, and HR Management. With clinical experience from Spandana Hospital
Pvt. Ltd., she has worked closely with psychiatric patients, building strong
therapeutic and communication skills. Passionate about Counselling Psychology,
she is committed to promoting emotional well-being and student development.
Ms.Ghosh has completed professional training in Counselling and Guidance
(Samadhana Counselling Centre & PES University), Basics of Hypnotherapy (PES
University), Industrial Psychology (Chanakya Mental Health Services), HR
Management (Chanakya Mentoring Platform), and has also successfully completed
the Faculty Development Program under MRD CFLD. She leads the “Mind Talks” and
heads the Media Club of the Psychology Department, actively fostering
mentorship, emotional awareness, and student engagement. A Gold Medallist in
Handball and an accomplished dancer, she strongly believes in holistic
development through academic, athletic, and creative pursuits.

name: Srishti Muralidharan
about:
Prof. Srishti is a Postgraduate in Clinical Psychology with specialized training
in psychotherapy. She is a practicing therapist with extensive experience
delivering individualized psychological interventions across diverse
populations. Alongside her clinical work, she has significant industry
experience, collaborating with mental health organizations, educational
institutions, and wellness programs to design and implement evidence-based
interventions. Her professional journey is deeply rooted in a passion for
teaching and mentoring the next generation of psychologists. She integrates her
clinical and industry expertise into academic settings, fostering a dynamic and
application-oriented learning environment that encourages critical thinking and
compassion in students. She is also a published author, with multiple research
papers and articles to her credit in the fields of clinical psychology, mental
health, and therapeutic interventions. A dedicated advocate for mental wellness,
Prof. Srishti actively contributes to community service initiatives and
awareness campaigns. Her areas of interest inlude Indian Psychology, Social
Psychology, Neuropsychology, Personality Psychology and Psychotherapy.

name: Sujay C
about:
Prof. Sujay C holds an MBA in Marketing and an M.Phil in Management, and is
currently pursuing his Ph.D. with a focus on Marketing. With over 10 years of
combined academic and industry experience, he brings a strong blend of academic
depth and applied perspective. He serves as the Placement Coordinator for the
BBA and BBA Business Analytics programs at PES University and works with
national and international organizations to support Hackathon-based learning.
His research interests include consumer behaviour, sustainability, and
data-driven social media marketing, with publications in Scopus and ABDC indexed
journals, along with presentations at national and international conferences. He
has been involved in designing and teaching core courses, supporting the
organization of academic events with industry participation, and contributing to
institutional-level collaborations. His professional philosophy emphasizes
experiential and case-based learning that integrates academic rigor with
practical relevance to prepare students for the evolving business world.

for advancing pharmaceutical care in infectious diseases. My research interests
span clinical trials, therapeutic drug monitoring, and pharmacoeconomic
analysis, with a focus on optimizing patient outcomes. I am also dedicated to
exploring the intersection of pharmacoepidemiology and public health policy.With
a strong background in pharmacy practice and education, I strive to inspire and
mentor future pharmacists in evidence-based practice and research. My goal is to
contribute to the development of innovative treatment strategies and healthcare
solutions that improve patient care and reduce healthcare costs.

about:
Yaswanth Narikamalli is an enthusiastic and dedicated academician with a strong
foundation in both industry and teaching. He holds an M.Tech in Internet of
Things from JNTUA. With prior experience as a Software Engineer at Yalamanchili
Engineering Pvt. Ltd., Yaswanth transitioned into academia with a passion for
shaping future technologists. He has been serving as an Assistant Professor
since July 2023, teaching undergraduate students in areas such as Java, Internet
of Things (IoT), Cloud Computing, Software Engineering, Open Source
Technologies, and Database Management Systems. His teaching approach emphasizes
practical learning, industry relevance, and student engagement. He actively
mentors students through hands-on workshops and technical activities that bridge
the gap between academia and industry. Yaswanth has actively contributed to
research with publications indexed in Springer and Web of Science (WoS),
reflecting his commitment to advancing knowledge in emerging technologies. His
research interests primarily focus on Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Data
Science, with an emphasis on real-world applications. He is known for his
positive attitude, curiosity, and commitment to continuous learning, making him
a valuable contributor to the academic community.

about:
Smrthi Harits is an educator, management consultant, and policy researcher with
a deep commitment to public service, design education, and cultural heritage.
She currently serves as the Program Manager at the Institute of Design, PES
University, where she brings a multidisciplinary approach to design, management,
and policy implementation. With an MBA in Marketing and extensive experience in
service design for the public sector, her areas of interest include public
policy marketing, last-mile delivery of government services, and leveraging
India's soft power through artistic and cultural initiatives. She is
particularly passionate about integrating design thinking and service innovation
into policy frameworks to enhance citizen engagement and governance. With over a
decade of experience in the non-profit sector, Smrthi has successfully led and
managed NGOs, advocating for cultural preservation and social impact. She is the
Founder of Kagakka Gubakka, a movement dedicated to reconnecting children with
India's rich cultural heritage through storytelling and games. Additionally, she
serves as a Director at Samhati Foundation, an organization focused on
strengthening and advocating for the Indian family system. Her work spans
education, policy, and cultural entrepreneurship, making her a key contributor
to both academic and social discourse in India.

about:
As a seasoned banking professional with over 23 years of extensive experience in
the financial sector, specializing in Risk Management across both public and
foreign banks, I have a strong expertise in Credit, Market, and Operational
Risk. I have played a pivotal role in shaping risk frameworks, ensuring
regulatory compliance, and fostering a robust risk culture within organizations.
Throughout my career, I have conducted comprehensive risk assessments, developed
insightful risk reports, and presented key findings to senior management to
drive strategic decision-making. Apart from this corporate experience, I have
always been passionate about teaching and knowledge sharing. Even while working
in the banking sector, I was actively involved in training and development
programs, conducting sessions at staff training centers on various banking and
risk management topics. This passion for education led to my transition into
academia, where I am now serving as a Professor of Practice in the Faculty of
Management and Commerce in our esteemed PES University.

name: Sneha V
research:
1. Civic Sense and Responsibilities: Dearth of Civic Awareness Among Indians A
socially-driven study aimed at understanding the lack of civic sense in Indian
society. The project explored behavioral patterns, civic responsibility gaps,
and the impact of poor public discipline, proposing awareness-based
interventions and educational strategies to foster responsible citizenship.
2. The Comparative Study on SIP and Lump Sum in Mutual Fund Products This project
focused on analyzing the performance and investor benefits of Systematic
Investment Plans (SIP) versus lump sum investments. Using the XIRR method and an
asset allocation model, the study aimed to guide investors in making informed
decisions based on return consistency, risk appetite, and market timing.
3. The Study on Safeguarding Consumer Data and Privacy in Digital Marketing This
research examined the growing importance of data privacy in the digital space.
Through primary data collection, it analyzed how businesses collect, use, and
protect consumer data in online marketing, highlighting best practices for
compliance, security measures, and consumer trust building.
